title: Sabatier Professional 22cm Heavy Duty Kitchen Scissors - Ultra Sharp Fine Serrated Blades & Perfect Soft Grip Handles with Cork Effect. Multipurpose Shears for General Kitchen Tasks. Dishwasher Safe
features: RAZOR-SHARP PROFESSIONAL KITCHEN SCISSORS - Standard blades require excessive force & cause hand fatigue. Not with Sabatier Professional Kitchen Scissors! They are precision-engineered with finely serrated blades for effortless cutting of poultry joints, small bones, seafood shells, herbs, tough packaging, & more. Micro-serrations enhance grip, preventing slippage for clean, controlled cuts. Designed for high-performance use, they are perfect for food preparation & general kitchen tasks.

COMMERCIAL-GRADE, PREMIUM STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - Low-quality blades can dull quickly, rust, or bend under pressure, leading to inefficient cutting. Not with our scissors! Forged from high-carbon stainless steel, they offer superior corrosion resistance & tensile strength. Designed for long-term durability, they maintain their structural integrity over time, ensuring consistently sharp, precise cuts without deformation. A reliable tool for everyday household & professional tasks.

ERGONOMIC, SOFT-GRIP HANDLES WITH CORK EFFECT - Poorly designed handles can cause discomfort, reduce control, & lead to hand fatigue. These scissors feature an ergonomic handle structure with a soft grip & a cork-effect finish for enhanced tactile feedback. Designed to distribute pressure evenly, they reduce strain on the fingers & wrist while providing a secure, slip-resistant hold. Plus, they feature an adjustable tension pivot for added stability & comfort. Perfect for everyday use!

SUITABLE FOR BOTH LEFT- AND RIGHT-HANDED USE - Ordinary scissors are often designed exclusively for right-handed users, making them difficult for left-handed individuals to use effectively. Not ours! These scissors feature an ambidextrous handle design, ensuring equal comfort & control for both left- & right-handed users. Cleverly designed for effortless cutting, they eliminate strain & awkward hand positioning. A versatile solution for households, offices, & workspaces with multiple users.

DISHWASHER-SAFE - Pictures don’t do these scissors justice. You really need to hold them in your hands to feel the high-quality workmanship that has gone into making them. We’re so confident in the strength & quality of our product that any item found defective will be repaired or replaced without charge, subject to normal household use. Taylor's Eye Witness has been making kitchen tools for over 150 years & prides itself on the reliability of our products.
description: Finally, Scissors That Work Like They Should We've all been there—struggling with a pair of blunt, flimsy scissors that just won’t cut it (literally). Whether it's trying to trim fresh herbs without crushing them, wrestling with stubborn plastic packaging, or attempting to slice through chicken joints with kitchen shears that barely make a dent, the struggle is real. And let’s not even talk about the discomfort of handles that dig into your fingers, leaving your hands sore after just a few snips. That’s why we’re here to introduce a game-changer—the Sabatier Professional Scissors Collection . Effortless Cutting for Every Task Imagine never having to deal with jagged edges, half-cut materials, or unnecessary hand strain again. These scissors are crafted with high-quality stainless steel blades that stay razor-sharp , no matter the job. The Handy Scissors (15cm) are perfect for those intricate, everyday tasks—trimming flowers, snipping fresh basil, or handling office work with pinpoint accuracy. Need something tougher? The All-Purpose Scissors (25cm) step up for cutting through fabrics, paper, and general household needs with ease. And for the real heavy lifting in the kitchen, the Kitchen Scissors (22cm) come equipped with fine serrated blades to grip and slice through chicken legs, small bones, and even the most stubborn packaging. Plus, with an ergonomic soft-grip handle featuring a stylish cork effect , every pair is designed to provide superior comfort, reducing strain even during prolonged use. A Reliable Tool You’ll Use Every Day Let’s be honest—scissors aren’t something you think about until you’re stuck with a terrible pair. But once you experience the precision, ease, and durability of Sabatier Professional Scissors, you’ll wonder how you ever managed without them.
